name: No more shopping simulator
author: Joshi
description: This mod tries to reduce the endless shopping in modded runs with close to infinite cash. While in a shop press ctrl+F to start selection mode. Press spacebar over any item (either in collection or wherever else you can find something that spawns in shop).  It should now have a Sticker that 'marks' it as a target. After pressing ctrl+F again the next reroll you do, will keep rerolling the shop until you hit any of the marked items. Will also stop if your money reaches 0 or you press ctrl+F again
